docs.title: Class: ClinicalStudySubject
docs.text:
A living person who is observed, analyzed, examined, investigated, experimented upon, and/or treated in the course of a clinical study. This includes studies where an investigator obtains identifiable private information or data through the intervention or interaction with the individual. code#C70668

URI: ncit:ClinicalStudySubject

 classDiagram
    class ClinicalStudySubject
    click ClinicalStudySubject href "../ClinicalStudySubject/"
      HumanStudySubject <|-- ClinicalStudySubject
        click HumanStudySubject href "../HumanStudySubject/"

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• HumanStudySubject
    • ClinicalStudySubject

docs.title: Class: CrohnDisease
docs.text:
A gastrointestinal disorder characterized by chronic inflammation involving all layers of the intestinal wall, noncaseating granulomas affecting the intestinal wall and regional lymph nodes, and transmural fibrosis. Crohn disease most commonly involves the terminal ileum; the colon is the second most common site of involvement.

URI: ncit:CrohnDisease

 classDiagram
    class CrohnDisease
    click CrohnDisease href "../CrohnDisease/"
      InflammatoryBowelDisease <|-- CrohnDisease
        click InflammatoryBowelDisease href "../InflammatoryBowelDisease/"

docs.text:
• InflammatoryBowelDisease
    • CrohnDisease

docs.title: Class: InflammatoryBowelDisease

A spectrum of small and large bowel inflammatory diseases of unknown etiology. It includes Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, and colitis of indeterminate type

docs.title: Class: Observation
docs.text:
Observation - Act of carrying out an (Observation) Procedure to estimate or calculate a value of a property of a FeatureOfInterest. Links to a Sensor to describe what made the Observation and how; links to an ObservableProperty to describe what the result is an estimate of, and to a FeatureOfInterest to detail what that property was associated with.

URI: sosa:Observation

 classDiagram
    class Observation
    click Observation href "../Observation/"
      Observation : hasResult





        Observation --> "0..1" Result : hasResult
        click Result href "../Result/"



      Observation : hasSimpleResult

      Observation : phenomenonTime

      Observation : resultTime

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance resultTime 0..1  Integer The result time is the instant of time when the Observation, Actuation or Sam... direct phenomenonTime 0..1  Integer The time that the Result of an Observation, Actuation, or Sampling applies to... direct hasSimpleResult 0..1  Integer The simple value of an Observation or Actuation direct hasResult 0..1  Result The Result of an Observation, Actuation, or act of Sampling direct

docs.title: Usages
docs.text: used by used in type used Sample isFeatureOfInterestOf range Observation Observation resultTime domain Observation Observation phenomenonTime domain Observation Observation hasSimpleResult domain Observation

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://ibdb.org/ontology

docs.title: Mappings
docs.text: Mapping Type Mapped Value self sosa:Observation native https://ibdb.org/ontology/Observation

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: Observation
description: Observation - Act of carrying out an (Observation) Procedure to estimate
  or calculate a value of a property of a FeatureOfInterest. Links to a Sensor to
  describe what made the Observation and how; links to an ObservableProperty to describe
  what the result is an estimate of, and to a FeatureOfInterest to detail what that
  property was associated with.
from_schema: https://ibdb.org/ontology
slot_usage:
  observedProperty:
    name: observedProperty
    range: Sample
    required: true
attributes:
  resultTime:
    name: resultTime
    description: The result time is the instant of time when the Observation, Actuation
      or Sampling activity was completed
    from_schema: https://ibdb.org/ontology
    rank: 1000
    domain: Observation
    slot_uri: sosa:resultTime
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: integer
  phenomenonTime:
    name: phenomenonTime
    description: The time that the Result of an Observation, Actuation, or Sampling
      applies to the FeatureOfInterest. Not necessarily the same as the resultTime.
      May be an interval or an instant, or some other compound temporal entity [owl-time]
    from_schema: https://ibdb.org/ontology
    rank: 1000
    domain: Observation
    slot_uri: sosa:phenomenonTime
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: integer
  hasSimpleResult:
    name: hasSimpleResult
    description: The simple value of an Observation or Actuation.
    from_schema: https://ibdb.org/ontology
    rank: 1000
    domain: Observation
    slot_uri: sosa:hasSimpleResult
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: integer
  hasResult:
    name: hasResult
    description: The Result of an Observation, Actuation, or act of Sampling. To store
      an observation's simple result value one can use the hasSimpleResult property
    from_schema: https://ibdb.org/ontology
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: sosa:Result
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: Result
class_uri: sosa:Observation

docs.title: Class: Result

The Result of an Observation, Actuation, or act of Sampling. To store an observation's simple result value one can use the hasSimpleResult property.

docs.title: Class: UlcerativeColitis
docs.text:
An inflammatory bowel disease involving the mucosal surface of the large intestine and rectum. It may present with an acute or slow onset and follows an intermittent or continuous course. Signs and symptoms include abdominal pain, diarrhea, fever, weight loss, and intestinal hemorrhage.

URI: ncit:UlcerativeColitis

 classDiagram
    class UlcerativeColitis
    click UlcerativeColitis href "../UlcerativeColitis/"
      InflammatoryBowelDisease <|-- UlcerativeColitis
        click InflammatoryBowelDisease href "../InflammatoryBowelDisease/"
